exploration_notes: Searched both local repos and Sourcegraph for all occurrences of 'envoy.api.v2' in .proto, C++, and YAML files across envoyproxy/envoy and envoyproxy/data-plane-api. Found three categories of references: (1) The full set of legacy v2 proto definitions living under api/envoy/api/v2/ and envoy/api/v2/ (~39 .proto files per repo), plus the v2 discovery service protos (ads.proto, sds.proto). (2) v3 proto files that reference envoy.api.v2 via udpa versioning annotations (previous_message_type) — thes
